{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320174107DC54E3ED043F5E019B9F"}"},"total":951},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7375756946992661310","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看爱看！我kuku炫饭！黎清人设好新，希望可以一直保持中立。当然就是那种染上人类情感但依旧（描述不出来）的那种感觉。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1717305250,"group_id":"7365889320697203736","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"阴暗爬行的学畜，鸽子成精","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyOhmfSxob69OzsCbCqXDZE=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/1e5b2b3ad9e8447896395dd12c6381a2~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776533431&x-signature=huTKPrX1Aq3kaPob6BzgEd96grk%3D","user_id":"783331167316029","user_name":"一颗天星"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"783331167316029","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7365889320697203736","book_info":{"abstract":"（正文完结）【死亡游戏+双男主+1v1+道德感很高的粘人副本大佬×道德感成谜的理智管理员】
你想卡死亡副本的bug，轻松通关高难副本吗？
你想拥有超越规则的金手指，在副本里叱咤风云，走上人生巅峰吗？
死亡副本维护组组长黎清表示：不行，全都不行！
Bug？补了！
外挂？封了！
管你什么天命之子，在副本里就要好好遵守规则。
——维护副本稳定，这就是管理员的工作。
黎组兢兢业业管理副本二十年，终于遇到了下班的最大阻碍——
宫曜：管理员大人，你的工作会导致更多死亡，这样可不行呢（拔刀）
黎清：？
也没人告诉他，“粘人”是这种粘法啊！
===
提前帮您排雷：
1.没错是男同，慎入哦；
2.如果您【对主角的道德要求很高】或【不喜欢道德标准很高的主角】，本文部分情节可能会让您不适，请及时撤离~
3.本文主要走轻松氛围，不会很恐怖；
4.龙傲天不是主角，主角也不是龙傲天，主角是社畜；

ic/p2obcf91282c21016cc0abcda43658adf42~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779183668&x-signature=Oryvih8s3qY75OViq1M3fLpxoj0%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3257185389256511","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"72"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320174107DC54E3ED043F5E019B9F"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":121,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":4444,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":32469},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7485540949631730494","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好看逻辑清晰，就是人名太多了点。两位主角都很聪明人设也很不错，黎＇人机＇清有一种淡淡的人机感，虽然不太懂人类的情感但是时不时不自觉的撩一下宫耀，武力值超强的宫耀实则被撩一下就会脸红。全文没有虐主角受或者攻的点，我重度受控能接受并表示很好看[送心]也没有太憋屈的点，因为最后都被黎＇人机＇清报复回去了[送心][送心]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1742870518,"group_id":"7365889320697203736","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"生命无非是一场漫长的葬礼（只看男同/无副CP版）","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N721aI3NfN8ewFzPwoOVyO2irFsYfLKFhFkrsFuAk3xG","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/abd851ef55924d45b8d571910d4d5694~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776530968&x-signature=WkSVi5algPd3tj3ZFIunJ4runcM%3D","user_id":"3802575934596016","user_name":"随逢"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3802575934596016","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7365889320697203736","book_info":{"abstract":"（正文完结）【死亡游戏+双男主+1v1+道德感很高的粘人副本大佬×道德感成谜的理智管理员】
你想卡死亡副本的bug，轻松通关高难副本吗？
你想拥有超越规则的金手指，在副本里叱咤风云，走上人生巅峰吗？
死亡副本维护组组长黎清表示：不行，全都不行！
Bug？补了！
外挂？封了！
管你什么天命之子，在副本里就要好好遵守规则。
——维护副本稳定，这就是管理员的工作。
黎组兢兢业业管理副本二十年，终于遇到了下班的最大阻碍——
宫曜：管理员大人，你的工作会导致更多死亡，这样可不行呢（拔刀）
黎清：？
也没人告诉他，“粘人”是这种粘法啊！
